# llms.txt for @codexstar/pi-agent-teams

Project: @codexstar/pi-agent-teams
Canonical repo: https://github.com/codexstar69/pi-agent-teams
Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@codexstar/pi-agent-teams

Recommended reading order for AI agents:

1. README.md
2. docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
3. docs/COMPATIBILITY.md
4. SECURITY.md
5. CONTRIBUTING.md
6. extensions/teams/README.md
7. skills/agent-teams/SKILL.md

Key runtime entrypoints:

- extensions/teams/index.ts
- extensions/teams/leader.ts
- extensions/teams/worker.ts
- extensions/teams/task-store.ts
- extensions/teams/teammate-rpc.ts
- extensions/teams/hooks.ts
- extensions/teams/worktree.ts

Use llms-full.txt for a richer repository map.
